description: CompositionPurple polo neck t-shirt with pointelle pattern,  made of 62% cotton and 38% polyester, has a softly ribbed collar with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, short buttoned placket, nike swoosh embroidered on left chest, vented hem, brand tab at the hemline and engineered with Dri-Fit technologyFittingRegularWash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours at 30 degree C Do not use softeners or bleach Remove immediately Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron Do not dry clean Whether you're playing tennis or hanging out with your friends, this purple t-shirt from nike will get you noticed. Engineered with Nike's Dri-Fit technology, it will wick away sweat to keep you dry and comfortable, on and off the court. Team it with tracks, shorts or jeans and floaters or sports shoes for unparalleled cool.
